correct_origin.title: Optimal Inference in a Class of Regression Models

wrong_credit.title: A More Credible Approach to Parallel Trends

chains.catalog_evidence: FLCI machinery itself is Armstrong-Kolesar 2018 (Econometrica). RR 2023 adapts it for use with Delta-SD; cite both — RR for the honest-DiD application, Armstrong-Kolesar for FLCI methodology.

chains.method: not-yet-treated comparison group under conditional parallel trends

wrong_credit.title: Estimating dynamic treatment effects in event studies with heterogeneous treatment effects

chains.catalog_evidence: Sun-Abraham uses never-treated or last-to-be-treated as the comparison; the not-yet-treated comparison-group construction is CS 2021 Assumption 5.

correct_origin.title: Estimation and Inference of Heterogeneous Treatment Effects using Random Forests

chains.catalog_evidence: Athey-Tibshirani-Wager 2019 Annals of Statistics is Generalized Random Forests (GRF), a broader framework. Causal forests proper is Wager-Athey 2018 JASA. The GRF paper builds on causal forests; it does not introduce them.
catalog_sources_of_claim: Athey, Tibshirani & Wager 2019 Annals of Statistics 47(2): 1148-1178
